title: Update GasRefillPanel with new Gas Changed and Refill Delivered dates

requirements.summary: Update GasRefillPanel to display gas change and refill delivery dates with 'Previously on:' and 'Latest on:' layout groups
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Cooking Gas Changed On' section displays a 'Previously on:' group containing '24th Dec 2025' and '26th Jan 2026'.
The 'Cooking Gas Changed On' section displays a 'Latest on:' group containing '2nd Mar 2026'.
The 'Refill Delivered On Below Dates:' section displays a 'Previously on:' group containing '8th Dec 2025' and '21st Jan 2026'.
The 'Refill Delivered On Below Dates:' section displays a 'Latest on:' group containing '3rd Feb 2026'.
The card styling remains consistent with the rest of the GasRefillPanel.

file_operations.description: Update the 'Cooking Gas Changed On' section to use a 'Previously on:' sub-label listing '24th Dec 2025' and '26th Jan 2026', followed by a 'Latest on:' sub-label showing '2nd Mar 2026'. Update the 'Refill Delivered On Below Dates:' section to use the same layout structure: 'Previously on:' listing '8th Dec 2025' and '21st Jan 2026', and 'Latest on:' showing '3rd Feb 2026'. Maintain all existing card styling and dark theme consistency.
